key_items: Bitcoin copying 2022 bear market 'almost perfectly' with key support failing
Mt. Gox moved $739M in BTC while market under stress, triggering liquidation fears
Bitcoin plunged to $65K with traders hedging against $50K drop; macro headwinds (oil, bonds, USD strength) intensifying
reasoning: Multiple technical breakdown signals combined with macro headwinds (rising oil/yields, USD strength) and Mt. Gox movement creating forced liquidation pressure are outweighing positive catalysts like Mastercard stablecoin adoption and potential institutional accumulation. Near-term price action appears vulnerable with key support levels failing and liquidation cascades suggesting momentum to the downside.
risks: Bitcoin breaking below $65K support level with $50K now a realistic hedge target if macro conditions (USD, Treasury yields) continue deteriorating; Mt. Gox distribution could accelerate selling pressure.
